summary: Iteration 176 testing complete: Starseed Energy Gates feature and TradeCircle modularization. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All 12 TradeCircle tabs working. Energy Gates UI renders correctly with 5 gate cards, progress bars, user stats, and proper gate state display.
critical_code_review_comments: TradeCircle.js reduced from 1136 to 526 lines - modularization successful
TradeCircleWidgets.js contains ~647 lines of extracted modal/card components
EnergyGates.js properly implements 5 gates with progress tracking, time locks, travel requirements, and warp functionality
energy_gates.py backend correctly implements all 7 endpoints with proper validation
test_credentials: email: grad_test_522@test.com, password: password (Founding Architect, Level 1, 0 polished gems, 100 dust, 0 trades)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 176 features fully working. Energy Gates feature implemented with 5 gates (Earth, Water, Fire, Air, Ether). Test user grad_test_522@test.com has consciousness_level=1, 0 polished gems, 100 dust, 0 trades. Gate of Earth shows consciousness met (green) but polished gems not met (0/1). All 12 TradeCircle tabs working after modularization. TradeCircleWidgets.js contains extracted components: CreateListingModal, OfferModal, ReviewModal, KarmaProfileModal, ListingCard, ListingDetail, KarmaBadge, TrustScoreBadge, CosmicHandshakeButton.

backend_apis.GET /api/energy-gates/status: Returns 5 gates with progress data, user_stats (dust, polished_gems, trades_completed, consciousness_level, realms_visited, credits), and total_unlocked count
backend_apis.POST /api/energy-gates/unlock: Rejects with 400 for insufficient polished gems, unknown gate, or missing previous gate unlock
backend_apis.POST /api/energy-gates/warp: Returns 400 for no time lock (gate_earth has 0 hours), handles insufficient credits
backend_apis.POST /api/energy-gates/travel: Records valid realm visits (starseed_journey, refinement_lab, cosmic_mixer, dream_realms, trade_circle), rejects invalid realms with 400
backend_apis.GET /api/energy-gates/travel-log: Returns realms_visited array, all_realms (5 total), total_visited, total_realms
backend_apis.GET /api/energy-gates/history: Returns unlocked array and history array with timestamps
backend_apis.authentication: All endpoints require auth, return 401/403 without token

frontend_energy_gates.gates_tab: Appears in TradeCircle tab bar with Zap icon and amber color (#D97706)
frontend_energy_gates.gate_of_earth: Shows consciousness 1/1 (green checkmark), polished gems 0/1 (not met)
frontend_energy_gates.locked_gates: Gate of Flow, Transmutation, Unseen show lock icons
frontend_energy_gates.user_stats: Displays 4 stats: Gems (0), Dust (100), Trades (0), Level (1)
frontend_energy_gates.progress_bars: Animated progress bars for consciousness and polished gems
frontend_energy_gates.gate_expansion: Clicking gate header expands to show details, description, rewards

trade_circle_modularization.tabs_working: All 12 tabs: Browse, Gates, Broker, Forge, Content, Escrow, Genesis, God Mode, Avatar, My Listings, Offers, Karma
trade_circle_modularization.extracted_widgets: CreateListingModal, OfferModal, ReviewModal, KarmaProfileModal, ListingCard, ListingDetail, KarmaBadge, TrustScoreBadge, CosmicHandshakeButton

gate_requirements.gate_earth: Level 1, 1 polished gem, 0 dust, 0 trades, no travel, 0h time lock
gate_requirements.gate_water: Level 2, 3 gems, 50 dust, 2 trades, travel: starseed_journey + refinement_lab, 4h time lock, 2 credits warp
gate_requirements.gate_fire: Level 3, 5 gems, 150 dust, 5 trades, travel: +cosmic_mixer, 12h time lock, 5 credits warp
gate_requirements.gate_air: Level 4, 8 gems, 300 dust, 10 trades, travel: +dream_realms, 24h time lock, 10 credits warp
gate_requirements.gate_ether: Level 5, 12 gems, 500 dust, 20 trades, travel: +trade_circle, 48h time lock, 20 credits warp
